title: 500ML 2 CUP Glass Liquid Measuring Cup With Handle, High Borosilicate Glass Three Scales (OZ, Cup, ML/CC) for Kitchen or Restaurant, V-Shaped Spout Glass Measuring Beaker, Easy To Read
description:
About this item
【Essential Kitchen Tool】: Measuring cup with multiple measurements (cup, ounce and milliliter). The measuring cup is lightweight, making it easy to handle and reducing the strain on your wrists, so the measuring cups that are perfect for baking, cooking, mixing and more!
【Heat-Resistant Thick Borosilicate Glass】: Glass measuring cup made of high borosilicate glass, lightweight, It does not contain lead and chromium, BPA free, and can be in direct contact with food, and apply to microwave, electric ceramic stove, oven, refrigerator, withstand. The insulated handle also ensures that your hands are protected from the heat.
【V-Shaped Spout Design】: The V-shaped spout allows for better flow control, without spilling, and ensuring accurate measurements every time.
【Easy To Read】: There are clear and accurate scales on the body of the cups, ensure that you can measuring all types of liquids and follow any cookbook. Easy to read, meet your daily needs. This glass measuring cup is a good helper for you to DIY your drink or food.
【RECOMMENDATION】: The measuring cup is very easy to clean, just a simple hand wash will keep it clean.(Dishwasher safe, But over time, dishwashers can affect measurement markers.) Prevent dry-burning on heating, and ensure that there must be water in the cup when heating.
reviews_5s:
This is a great measuring cup for liquids. If you know anything about borosilicate, you know how sturdy it is, even when it's thinner than most pyrex. This cup is created to pour easily, and it does. It can also go in the microwave to heat up any liquid that needs to be warm or hot. You can stick in the freezer if you need cold liquid.

The markings on the outside are clear and easy to read. It does come with a warning about not putting it in the dishwasher because the markings might wash off. I'm the dishwasher in my house, so i am careful when I wipe it down. That, however, is the only negative I can think of for this item.

I usually only use the cup measurement, but sometimes I need to measure in ml or in oz, and I like having that on this cup.This reminds me of a science beaker - it is taller and skinner than the traditional glass measuring cups. The glass is also a bit thinner than I'm used to. I double checked and it is microwave safe. The measurements are all in the same general area so it's easy to switch from cups to ml for measurement. The measurements are easy to see and when pouring, it doesn't drip! The footprint of this unit is also smaller than my former one so it takes up less space. It is recommended to be hand washed as the dishwasher over time will remove the measurement markers. Lastly, when cleaning it I used my kitchen brush as my hand is too big. Overall I'm very happy with this cup and would purchase it again.I have bought several measuring cups lately because the written measurements keeps fading off and I cannot read the level I am at. My eyes are not as good as they used to be and I love being able to read the levels on this measuring cup.
The writing is large and bold.
I am a little leary on how durable this is because the glass does not feel that thick. I will just need added care when using this.
I love the pour spout, it does not dribble.
Five stars for an excellent product at an excellent price.I really like the design of this measuring cup versus traditional cups with its taller, slimmer design. It’s easy to clean, microwave safe but not dishwasher safe unless you want to lose your measurements. I always hand wash mine anyway so not a problem for me. I compared the measurements of this one with my old Pyrex and they are spot on. Great value for a nice measuring cup.I like that it isn't so large in diameter and is taller. It is easy to read and pours well. The three different scales is handy too. Made of good quality material.I'm using this on a magnetic stirrer for mixing film developer. It has a nice flat bottom for this purpose. Very readable markings. I can easily recommend it.Light weight but solid measuring cup. Dishwasher safe.The glass feels pretty sturdy, has some weight to it.This glass measuring cup is well made, feels solid, and the measurement markings are clearly visible on the side. It's exactly the size I needed for the kitchen, and I couldn't be happier with it.
reviews_1s:
I was excited to receive this attractive measuring cup, but when looked at from a practical standpoint it is disappointing. It only has cup measurements for 1/4, 1/2, and full cups, there is no measurement for 1/3, or 2/3 cup. The instructions that come with the cup caution you to wash by hand only, do not put in the dishwasher because the measuring lines will wash off. This is really not practical in today’s world when almost all kitchen tools are dishwasher safe. People won’t think twice about putting in the dishwasher.

The most serious problem with this measuring cup is that the ounce scale does not line up with the cup scale. If you look closely, the ounce scale on the far left side shows two ounces at a time. When you look at the ounces on the left side and compare it with the cup scale on the right side you can easily see that 4 ounces don’t equal a half cup and 8 ounces don’t equal a cup, etc. Which scale is correct? How can a measuring cup be of any use when you can’t depend on the measurements to be correct? Maybe all three measurements on the cup are incorrect. I guess I’ll have to get out my trusty 45 year old Pyrex cup to find out.Tall for the diameter, could be wobbly
